meta.notes: Daily birthday-video cron. Fires at 12:00 UTC (~08:00 America/Toronto). Queries leads with date_of_birth NOT NULL where birthday_video_sent_year is null or < current year. Filters in JS to today's month+day. For each match: calls /webhook/mcp/video-orchestrate with intent='birthday' (which chains script-generate -> heygen-render -> async delivery), then patches the lead's birthday_video_sent_year so the next run doesn't double-send. Requires db migration add-date-of-birth-to-leads.sql + active clx-mcp-video-orchestrator-v1 + active clx-video-script-generator-v1 + active clx-video-heygen-render-v1. Dormant until those + Meta WhatsApp / Postmark deliveries clear.
